/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Test/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Windowing/source/uWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Core/source/UniversalUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Core/source/uApplication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Windowing/source/uWindowManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Rendering/source/uCanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UniversalUI.dir/Rendering/source/uRenderNode.cpp.o -o UniversalUI  -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker Cocoa -Xlinker -framework -Xlinker OpenGL
